heading: Southwestern Power Administration; deposit and availability of advance payments
label: 825s–4 Southwestern Power Administration; deposit and availability of advance payments
text: Notwithstanding , beginning in fiscal year 2005 and thereafter, such funds as are received by the Southwestern Power Administration from any State, municipality, corporation, association, firm, district, or individual as advance payment for work that is associated with Southwestern’s transmission facilities, consistent with that authorized in , shall be credited to this account and be available until expended.section 3302 of title 31section 825s of this title
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Energy and Water Development Appropriations Act, 2005, and also as part of the Consolidated Appropriations Act, 2005, and not as part of the Federal Power Act which generally comprises this chapter. Section is based on the proviso in the paragraph under the headings “POWER MARKETING ADMINISTRATIONS” and “” in title III of div. C of .Operation and Maintenance, Southwestern Power AdministrationPub. L. 108–447
